steps.title: Choose a possessive pronoun
steps.content: The blank comes before "methodology," so it must be possessive. The antecedent is "the technique," a singular nonhuman noun, so the pronoun must be singular and possessive.

steps.title: Avoid contractions and plurals
steps.content: Choice A means "they are," not possession. Choice C means "it is," also not possession. Choice D is plural and does not agree with "the technique." The remaining choice is the singular possessive form. The answer is B.
